data.title: OKEA Board Insider Increases Stake Through Share Purchase
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from OKEA ASA ( (DE:3SX) ) is now available.

A deputy board member and primary insider at Norwegian oil and gas operator OKEA ASA has increased his personal stake in the company through a purchase of 3,320 shares at NOK 39.90 each. The insider transaction, which brings his total holding to 3,320 shares, has been formally disclosed in line with market abuse and Norwegian securities regulations, underscoring OKEA’s adherence to transparency requirements for listed companies.

More about OKEA ASA

OKEA ASA is a leading mid- and late-life oil and gas operator on the Norwegian continental shelf, focusing on extracting value from assets that other companies divest. The company pursues an ambitious strategy centered on growth, value creation and capital discipline, and its shares are listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker OKEA.

Average Trading Volume: 648,233

Current Market Cap: NOK4.31B

data.title: Klaveness Combination Carriers Boosts Management Ownership Through Share and Option Grants
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Klaveness Combination Carriers AS ( (DE:36K) ) has issued an announcement.

Klaveness Combination Carriers has expanded equity participation by top management, with CEO Engebret Dahm and CFO and Deputy CEO Liv H. Dyrnes agreeing to acquire 10,000 and 3,000 company shares respectively at NOK 71.48 per share under the firm’s long-term incentive program. As part of the same program, Dahm has been granted 40,000 share options and Dyrnes 12,000 options with a strike price of NOK 89.35, while Dahm’s investment vehicle will pledge its 10,000 shares as collateral for a company loan, subject to shareholder approval at the April 29 annual meeting, underscoring strengthened alignment between leadership and shareholder interests ahead of upcoming fleet growth.

More about Klaveness Combination Carriers AS

Klaveness Combination Carriers ASA is a world-leading owner and operator of combination carriers that transport both wet and dry bulk cargoes. The fleet comprises nine CABU and eight CLEANBU vessels, with two additional CABU ships under construction for delivery in 2026, aiming to optimize trading patterns and cut CO2 emissions by up to 40% per transported ton versus conventional tankers and bulkers.

Average Trading Volume: 80,920

Current Market Cap: NOK5.4B

For an in-depth examination of 36K stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Narmada Agrobase Replaces Internal Auditor After Resignation
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Narmada Agrobase Limited ( (IN:NARMADA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Narmada Agrobase Limited has announced a change in its internal audit function, with M/s Rajesh Bhati & Associates resigning as internal auditor effective at the close of business on 28 March 2026, citing pre-occupation and personal commitments. The board has appointed M/s Hanish Agrawal & Associates as the new internal auditor with effect from the same date, a move that signals continuity in the company’s internal control and compliance processes under SEBI’s disclosure requirements.

The transition between internal auditors is being carried out in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations and related circulars, underscoring the company’s adherence to mandated corporate governance standards. For stakeholders, particularly investors and regulators, the prompt replacement of the internal auditor helps mitigate potential disruption to audit oversight and supports ongoing transparency in the company’s financial and operational reporting.

More about Narmada Agrobase Limited

Narmada Agrobase Limited operates in the agricultural sector, focusing on agro-based products and related services for the Indian market. The company is listed on both the National Stock Exchange of India and BSE, reflecting its participation in the public capital markets and regulatory oversight under SEBI’s listing framework.

Average Trading Volume: 219,406

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: 1.19B INR

data.title: Vaibhav Jewellers Shuts Trading Window Ahead of FY26 Results
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Manoj Vaibhav Gems ‘N’ Jewellers Limited ( (IN:MVGJL) ).

Manoj Vaibhav Gems ‘N’ Jewellers Limited has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives starting April 1, 2026, in line with its code of conduct and SEBI’s Prohibition of Insider Trading Regulations, 2015. The restriction will remain in place until 48 hours after the company declares its audited financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended March 31, 2026, underscoring its adherence to regulatory norms and efforts to prevent insider trading around key financial disclosures.

This trading window closure is a routine compliance step tied to the upcoming approval and announcement of audited results, during which insiders are barred from dealing in the company’s securities. The move reassures investors and regulators that the jeweller is following prescribed corporate governance practices, aiming to maintain market integrity and safeguard against any misuse of unpublished price-sensitive information during the results period.

More about Manoj Vaibhav Gems ‘N’ Jewellers Limited

Manoj Vaibhav Gems ‘N’ Jewellers Limited operates in the jewellery retail industry, focusing on the sale of gems and jewellery products under the Vaibhav Jewellers brand. The company serves customers primarily in India, with registered and corporate offices in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, indicating a strong regional presence in the southern Indian jewellery market.

Average Trading Volume: 4,281

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: 6.75B INR

SPML Infra Limited ( (IN:SPMLINFRA) ) has provided an announcement.

SPML Infra Limited has revised its internal organisation structure as part of an annual review, with the board identifying five existing executives as senior managerial personnel under SEBI’s listing regulations. The move aligns reporting lines directly to the managing director, formally recognising the strategic roles of the executive vice president, chief operating and technical officer, chief human resource officer, chief technology officer and chief legal officer, and is expected to strengthen governance and regulatory compliance.

By clarifying senior management responsibilities and elevating these roles within the hierarchy, SPML Infra aims to improve oversight and decision-making in its infrastructure operations. The update also underscores the company’s efforts to align with SEBI’s evolving corporate governance norms, which may reassure investors and other stakeholders about management accountability and transparency.

More about SPML Infra Limited

SPML Infra Limited is an Indian infrastructure company focused on engineering, procurement and construction projects, primarily in sectors such as water supply, power, and urban infrastructure. Listed on both the National Stock Exchange and BSE, the company serves public sector and government-linked clients, positioning itself as a key player in large-scale infrastructure development across India.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

SKM Egg Products Export (India) Ltd. ( (IN:SKMEGGPROD) ) has issued an update.

SKM Egg Products Export (India) Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window for company securities from 1 April 2026, in line with its code of conduct and SEBI’s Prohibition of Insider Trading Regulations, 2015. The window will remain closed for directors, connected persons and designated persons until 48 hours after the public announcement of audited financial results for the quarter and year ended 31 March 2026, reinforcing compliance controls around access to unpublished price-sensitive information.

The restriction bars these insiders from trading in the company’s shares during the specified period, aiming to prevent any potential misuse of financial results ahead of their disclosure. This routine compliance step underscores the company’s adherence to regulatory norms and is intended to safeguard market integrity and protect investor interests by ensuring fair disclosure practices.

More about SKM Egg Products Export (India) Ltd.

SKM Egg Products Export (India) Ltd. operates in the food processing industry, focusing on egg-based products for export and domestic markets. The company’s securities are listed on both the Bombay Stock Exchange and the National Stock Exchange, reflecting its presence in India’s public capital markets.

data.title: NTPC Clears Rs 9,000 Crore Push Into Battery Storage and Meja Thermal Expansion
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

NTPC Limited ( (IN:NTPC) ) has shared an announcement.

NTPC’s board has approved an investment of Rs 5,821.90 crore to develop a 4.70 GWh Battery Energy Storage System, underscoring the company’s pivot toward large-scale storage solutions to enhance grid stability and support renewable integration. In parallel, the board cleared an additional equity infusion of Rs 3,173.67 crore into joint venture Meja Urja Nigam Private Limited to fund the 2,400 MW Meja Super Thermal Power Project Stage-II, keeping the 50:50 ownership with UPRVUNL intact and reinforcing NTPC’s capacity expansion strategy in conventional power. The cash-funded commitments, expected to be executed through a rights issue in MUNPL by 2029-30, signal continued capital allocation to both thermal and storage assets, with implications for NTPC’s long-term generation mix and regional power supply in Uttar Pradesh.

More about NTPC Limited

NTPC Limited is India’s largest power generation company, operating across thermal and renewable energy segments with a growing focus on cleaner technologies. Through joint ventures such as Meja Urja Nigam Private Limited in Uttar Pradesh, NTPC is expanding its generation portfolio while also investing in grid-scale battery storage to support energy transition and grid reliability.

Average Trading Volume: 798,432

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: 3645B INR

data.title: Carnival Corporation: Persistent Risk Factors Keep Cruise Giant’s Outlook and Stock Under Pressure
data.description:
Carnival Corporation (CCL) has disclosed a new risk, in the Regulation category.

Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Carnival Corporation continues to face the comprehensive set of risks disclosed in its most recent Form 10-K, with no material changes identified since that filing. These known and unknown risks could still materially and adversely affect its performance, including results, operations, strategic outlook, growth prospects, liquidity profile, and ultimately its stock price.

Given this backdrop, investors must recognize that Carnival Corporation’s future results remain vulnerable not only to disclosed risk factors but also to emerging threats that may currently appear immaterial or remain unidentified. Such uncertainties could impair its cash flows, constrain capital allocation options, weaken market confidence, and damage its long‑term reputation in the cruise and travel industry.

Overall, Wall Street has a Strong Buy consensus rating on CCL stock based on 13 Buys and 2 Holds.
